blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 13 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 7,211 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 30".
